title: callista glossotis
intro: Callista glossotis, also known as the lip orchid, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Callista glossotis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Callista glossotis is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be applied topically to the skin as a salve or cream.
